title: Fix shared strings and richText
author: PetrChalov
body:
## Summary

Corrects the behavior of richText in SharedStrings

See https://github.com/exceljs/exceljs/issues/2267

## Test plan

Create a workbook with multiple richText values and enabled useSharedStrings.

comments.author: protobi-pieter
comments.body:
This bug was independently rediscovered and fixed in the protobi fork by @gwkline ([protobi/exceljs#50](https://github.com/protobi/exceljs/pull/50), now landed as [protobi/exceljs#66](https://github.com/protobi/exceljs/pull/66) with regression tests). The two fixes take different approaches:

- **This PR (#2588):** modifies the hash key inline within `SharedStrings.add()`
- **gwkline's fix:** uses `SharedStringXform.toXml()` for the richText hash key (lazy instance per `SharedStrings`)

The regression tests in protobi#66 should apply to both approaches if useful for moving this forward. Original bug report: #2267.
